title: 9 Herbal Creams For Grey Hair
description: Zingiber officinale creams contains active constituents like gingerol and shogaol, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. These properties help to promote healthy scalp and hair growth by reducing oxidative stress and inflammation that can contribute to graying of hair. The antioxidants in Zingiber officinale creams also help to neutralize free radicals that can damage hair follicles and lead to premature graying.
